conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
I have been really down lately. It’s been a few weeks, and I just can’t seem to shake the feeling that I should be doing better by now.
You mentioned feeling down for a few weeks—how has that been affecting your sleep?
It’s been terrible. I wake up in the middle of the night and just lie there thinking about how I failed, and then I can’t go back to sleep.
When you're lying awake at night thinking about failing, does that make it hard to care about things you normally enjoy during the day?
Yeah, it does. I used to love my job, but now it just feels like a chore. I go through the motions, but I’m just not interested in it anymore.
You mentioned thinking about how you failed at night—what kind of failure is on your mind?
I keep replaying the last few months in my head, thinking maybe I could have done something differently. It’s just constant self-blame.
You mentioned that things feel pointless - when did that start feeling this strong?
It started a few weeks ago, after I realized I was stuck in this situation and didn’t know how to get out.
When you're stuck in that situation and replaying things in your head, does it get hard to focus on other tasks?
Yeah, completely. I try to concentrate, but my mind just drifts back to what went wrong.
When you're stuck in that loop of replaying things, do you find yourself getting more irritable or on edge with people around you?
Definitely. I just get frustrated with everyone because I can’t seem to turn it off, and I don't know how to make it stop.
You mentioned feeling stuck and not knowing how to make it stop—what does getting out of that situation look like to you?
I just want to be able to move on. I want to be able to wake up in the morning and not feel like I’m walking into a trap.
You said you feel like you're walking into a trap in the morning—what does that trap feel like?
It feels like I'm trapped in this place where I can't seem to move forward.
When you feel trapped like that, does it affect your appetite or how you eat during the day?
Yeah, it does. I just skip meals because I don't have the energy to cook or eat.
